title: Google Sign-In - Verify handling of authentication failure
description: Tests how the app handles a failure during the Google authentication process.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.
A scenario that causes Google Auth to fail is simulated (e.g., no network, invalid credentials).

steps.description: 2. In the Google Sign-In dialog, perform an action that leads to failure (e.g., enter wrong password, have no internet).
3. Observe the application screen after the failure.

expected_result: An appropriate error message is displayed to the user, and the user remains on the Login screen.
